unicode-range: U+0-FF, U+131, U+152-153, U+2BB-2BC, U+2C6, U+= 2DA, U+2DC, U+304, U+308, U+329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+219= 3, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD; } ------MultipartBoundary--x2lc8nRWEaXbqx49OvX1rMHRe6j76XS7rD4nIdpAqm---- Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable Content-Location: cid:css-e95ee720-a4db-4dc8-95a3-65cd7dd1c9cf@mhtml.blink @charset "utf-8"; :root { --ivory: #FFFFF0; --beige: #F5F0E8; --rose: #F8D7DA; --powder: #E8C= 4C4; --blue: #D6EAF8; --mint: #D5F5E3; --lavender: #E8DAEF; --text-dark: #4= A3728; --text-mid: #6B5744; --text-light: #9B8470; --accent: #C9A0A0; --acc= ent-dark: #A07878; --gold: #C4A882; --white: #FFFFFF; } * { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; box-sizing: border-box; } html { scroll-behavior: smooth; } body { font-family: Lato, sans-serif; color: var(--text-dark); background: = var(--ivory); overflow-x: hidden; } .anim { opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.8s, transform 0.8s; } .anim.from-bottom { transform: translateY(50px); } .anim.from-left { transform: translateX(-60px); } .anim.from-right { transform: translateX(60px); } .anim.scale-in { transform: scale(0.85); } .anim.visible { opacity: 1 !important; transform: none !important; } .anim-delay-1 { transition-delay: 0.1s; } .anim-delay-2 { transition-delay: 0.2s; } .anim-delay-3 { transition-delay: 0.3s; } .anim-delay-4 { transition-delay: 0.4s; } .anim-delay-5 { transition-delay: 0.5s; } .anim-delay-6 { transition-delay: 0.6s; } nav { position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px; right: 0px; z-index: 1000; padd= ing: 18px 48px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-= between; background: rgba(255, 255, 240, 0.93); backdrop-filter: blur(14px)= ; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(196, 168, 130, 0.15); transition: padding 0= .4s, box-shadow 0.4s; gap: 12px; } nav.scrolled { padding: 12px 48px; box-shadow: rgba(74, 55, 40, 0.09) 0px 4= px 30px; } .nav-logo { font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-size: 1.25rem; col= or: var(--text-dark); font-style: italic; letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-decor= ation: none; } .nav-links { display: flex; gap: 30px; list-style: none; } .nav-links a { text-decoration: none; color: var(--text-mid); font-size: 0.= 8rem; letter-spacing: 1.8px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 400; t= ransition: color 0.3s; position: relative; } .nav-links a::after { content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: -3px; left: = 0px; width: 0px; height: 1px; background: var(--accent); transition: width = 0.3s; } .nav-links a:hover { color: var(--accent-dark); } .nav-links a:hover::after { width: 100%; } .nav-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; } .nav-insta { color: var(--text-mid); font-size: 1.45rem; transition: color = 0.3s, transform 0.3s; text-decoration: none; display: flex; align-items: ce= nter; } .nav-insta:hover { color: rgb(225, 48, 108); transform: scale(1.18) rotate(= -5deg); } .nav-tg { color: var(--text-mid); font-size: 1.45rem; transition: color 0.3= s, transform 0.3s; text-decoration: none; display: flex; align-items: cente= r; } .nav-tg:hover { color: rgb(0, 136, 204); transform: scale(1.18) rotate(5deg= ); } .burger { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; cursor: pointer;= background: none; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: = currentcolor; border-image: initial; padding: 4px; } .burger span { display: block; width: 24px; height: 2px; background: var(--= text-dark); transition: 0.3s; border-radius: 2px; } .burger.open span:nth-child(1) { transform: rotate(45deg) translate(5px, 5p= x); } .burger.open span:nth-child(2) { opacity: 0; } .burger.open span:nth-child(3) { transform: rotate(-45deg) translate(5px, -= 5px); } #hero { min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; position: re= lative; overflow: hidden; padding-top: 80px; background: linear-gradient(13= 5deg,var(--beige) 0%,var(--rose) 38%,var(--lavender) 72%,var(--blue) 100%);= } .hero-orb { position: absolute; border-radius: 50%; pointer-events: none; } .hero-orb-1 { top: -120px; right: -100px; width: 550px; height: 550px; back= ground: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(248, 215, 218, 0.55) 0%, transparent 7= 0%); animation: 9s ease-in-out 0s infinite normal none running orbFloat; } .hero-orb-2 { bottom: -100px; left: -80px; width: 450px; height: 450px; bac= kground: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(214, 234, 248, 0.5) 0%, transparent 7= 0%); animation: 12s ease-in-out 0s infinite reverse none running orbFloat; = } .hero-orb-3 { top: 30%; left: 40%; width: 300px; height: 300px; background:= radial-gradient(circle, rgba(213, 245, 227, 0.3) 0%, transparent 70%); ani= mation: 7s ease-in-out 2s infinite normal none running orbFloat; } @keyframes orbFloat {=20 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px) scale(1); } 50% { transform: translateY(-30px) scale(1.05); } } .hero-cross { position: absolute; top: 130px; right: 80px; font-size: 5rem;= color: rgba(196, 168, 130, 0.12); pointer-events: none; animation: 7s ease= -in-out 0s infinite normal none running orbFloat; font-family: "Playfair Di= splay", serif; } .hero-content { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0px auto; padding: 60px 48px; di= splay: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 80px; align-items: center= ; position: relative; z-index: 2; } .hero-text { animation: 1s ease 0.2s 1 normal forwards running heroSlideLef= t; opacity: 0; } @keyframes heroSlideLeft {=20 0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-50px); } 100% { opacity: 1; transform: none; } } .hero-photo-wrap { animation: 1s ease 0.4s 1 normal forwards running heroSl= ideRight; opacity: 0; } @keyframes heroSlideRight {=20 0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(50px); } 100% { opacity: 1; transform: none; } } .hero-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; backgrou= nd: rgba(196, 168, 130, 0.14); border: 1px solid rgba(196, 168, 130, 0.3); = color: var(--gold); font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform= : uppercase; padding: 6px 18px; border-radius: 20px; margin-bottom: 22px; f= ont-weight: 700; } .hero-name { font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-size: clamp(2.8re= m, 5vw, 4.4rem); line-height: 1.05; color: var(--text-dark); margin-bottom:= 10px; } .hero-name span { font-style: italic; color: var(--accent-dark); } .hero-title { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--text-light); letter-spacing:= 2px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 26px; font-weight: 300; } .hero-divider { width: 60px; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg= ,var(--accent),var(--powder)); margin-bottom: 22px; } .hero-slogan { font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-size: 1.35rem; = color: var(--text-mid); font-style: italic; line-height: 1.65; margin-botto= m: 36px; } .hero-tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 36px;= } .hero-tag { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.72); border: 1px solid rgba(1= 96, 168, 130, 0.22); color: var(--text-mid); font-size: 0.78rem; padding: 5= px 14px; border-radius: 20px; transition: background 0.3s, transform 0.3s; = } .hero-tag:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95); transform: transla= teY(-2px); } .btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; backgr= ound: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent-dark)); color: var(= --white); text-decoration: none; padding: 16px 36px; border-radius: 50px; f= ont-size: 0.88rem; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; font-wei= ght: 700; transition: 0.3s; box-shadow: rgba(160, 120, 120, 0.3) 0px 8px 30= px; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; b= order-image: initial; cursor: pointer; font-family: Lato, sans-serif; } .btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: rgba(160, 120= , 120, 0.45) 0px 14px 40px; background: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent= -dark),#8B6060); } .hero-photo-frame { position: relative; display: flex; justify-content: cen= ter; } .hero-photo-frame::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 25px -2= 5px -25px 25px; border: 2px solid rgba(196, 168, 130, 0.28); border-radius:= 60% 40% 55% 45% / 45% 55%; animation: 9s ease-in-out 0s infinite normal no= ne running morphBorder; } @keyframes morphBorder {=20 0%, 100% { border-radius: 60% 40% 55% 45% / 45% 55%; } 50% { border-radius: 40% 60% 45% 55% / 55% 45%; } } .hero-photo { width: 400px; height: 510px; object-fit: cover; object-positi= on: center top; border-radius: 55% 45% 50% 50% / 40% 40% 60% 60%; box-shado= w: rgba(74, 55, 40, 0.22) 0px 30px 80px; position: relative; z-index: 2; tr= ansition: transform 0.6s; } .hero-photo:hover { transform: scale(1.03); } .hero-badge-float { position: absolute; bottom: 50px; right: -15px; backgro= und: var(--white); border-radius: 20px; padding: 14px 20px; box-shadow: rgb= a(74, 55, 40, 0.14) 0px 10px 40px; z-index: 3; display: flex; align-items: = center; gap: 10px; animation: 1s ease 0.9s 1 normal forwards running badgeP= op; opacity: 0; } @keyframes badgePop {=20 0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.8) translateY(10px); } 100% { opacity: 1; transform: none; } } .badge-icon { width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%; background: li= near-gradient(135deg,var(--rose),var(--powder)); display: flex; align-items= : center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--accent-d= ark); } .badge-txt { font-size: 0.74rem; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: 1.5; = } .badge-txt strong { display: block; color: var(--text-dark); font-size: 0.8= 4rem; } section { padding: 100px 48px; } .section-label { font-size: 0.7rem; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: up= percase; color: var(--gold); font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 12px; } .section-title { font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-size: clamp(2= rem, 3.5vw, 3rem); color: var(--text-dark); margin-bottom: 18px; line-heigh= t: 1.15; } .section-title em { font-style: italic; color: var(--accent-dark); } .section-divider { width: 60px; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90= deg,var(--accent),transparent); margin-bottom: 40px; } .section-center { text-align: center; } .section-center .section-divider { margin: 0px auto 40px; } #about { background: var(--white); position: relative; overflow: hidden; } #about::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: -100px; right: -100p= x; width: 500px; height: 500px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-grad= ient(circle, rgba(232, 218, 239, 0.25) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events= : none; } .about-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0px auto; display: grid; grid-tem= plate-columns: 1fr 1.2fr; gap: 80px; align-items: start; } .about-photos { position: relative; height: 580px; } .about-photo-main { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 310px; = height: 400px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center top; background: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--rose= ),var(--powder)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: cent= er; font-size: 2rem; box-shadow: rgba(196, 160, 160, 0.3) 0px 10px 30px; } .about-description { font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.95; color: var(--text-= mid); margin-bottom: 28px; } .about-values { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; m= argin-bottom: 32px; } .about-val { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; padding: 13= px 14px; background: var(--beige); border-radius: 12px; border-left: 3px so= lid var(--accent); transition: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; } .about-val:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: rgba(74, 55, 40= , 0.08) 0px 8px 24px; } .about-val-icon { font-size: 1.05rem; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; } .about-val-text { font-size: 0.83rem; color: var(--text-mid); line-height: = 1.45; } .about-specs { background: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--beige),var(--rose))= ; border-radius: 20px; padding: 26px; } .about-specs h4 { font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-size: 1.05re= m; color: var(--text-dark); margin-bottom: 14px; } .spec-list { list-style: none; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: = 7px; } .spec-list li { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 9px; font-size: 0.= 86rem; color: var(--text-mid); } .spec-list li::before { content: "=E2=9C=A6"; color: var(--accent); font-si= ze: 0.65rem; flex-shrink: 0; } #services { background: linear-gradient(180deg,var(--beige),var(--ivory)); = } .services-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0px auto; } .services-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap:= 26px; } .service-card { background: var(--white); border-radius: 24px; padding: 36p= x; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.35s, box-s= hadow 0.35s; box-shadow: rgba(74, 55, 40, 0.06) 0px 4px 20px; } .service-card::before { content: ""; position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 0p= x; right: 0px; height: 4px; border-radius: 24px 24px 0px 0px; } .service-card:nth-child(1)::before { background: linear-gradient(90deg,var(= --rose),var(--powder)); } .service-card:nth-child(2)::before { background: linear-gradient(90deg,var(= --blue),var(--mint)); } .service-card:hover { transform: translateY(-10px); box-shadow: rgba(74, 55= , 40, 0.13) 0px 24px 64px; } .svc-icon { width: 62px; height: 62px; border-radius: 18px; display: flex; = align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.6rem; margin-bot= tom: 18px; } .service-card:nth-child(1) .svc-icon { background: linear-gradient(135deg,v= ar(--rose),var(--powder)); } .service-card:nth-child(2) .svc-icon { background: linear-gradient(135deg,v= ar(--blue),var(--mint)); } .svc-name { font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-size: 1.25rem; col= or: var(--text-dark); margin-bottom: 11px; } .svc-desc { font-size: 0.88rem; color: var(--text-light); line-height: 1.75= ; margin-bottom: 18px; } .svc-meta { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 16px;= } .svc-meta span { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: 0= .78rem; color: var(--text-mid); } .svc-meta i { color: var(--accent); font-size: 0.72rem; } .svc-price { margin-bottom: 22px; } .price-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: = 6px; } .price-badge { background: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--rose),var(--powder)= ); color: var(--accent-dark); font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 700; padding= : 4px 12px; border-radius: 20px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; } .price-type { font-size: 0.8rem; color: var(--text-light); } .btn-svc { display: inline-flex; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.3s; font-family: Lato, sans-serif; = } .btn-svc:hover { background: var(--accent); color: var(--white); transform:= translateX(5px); } #approach { background: var(--white); position: relative; overflow: hidden;= } #approach::after { content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: 0px; left: 0px;= width: 500px; height: 500px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradie= nt(circle, rgba(213, 245, 227, 0.28) 0%, transparent 70%); pointer-events: = none; } .approach-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0px auto; } .approach-scheme { margin-top: 20px; border-radius: 24px; overflow: hidden;= box-shadow: rgba(74, 55, 40, 0.12) 0px 20px 60px; transition: transform 0.= 4s, box-shadow 0.4s; } .approach-scheme:hover { transform: scale(1.01); box-shadow: rgba(74, 55, 4= 0, 0.18) 0px 30px 80px; } .approach-scheme img { width: 100%; display: block; } #gallery { background: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--beige),var(--rose) 50%,= var(--lavender)); padding: 80px 48px; } .gallery-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0px auto; } .gallery-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); grid-= auto-rows: 260px; gap: 14px; } .gal-item { border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: rgba(74, 55,= 40, 0.12) 0px 8px 30px; position: relative; cursor: pointer; transition: t= ransform 0.35s, box-shadow 0.35s; } .gal-item:hover { transform: scale(1.04); box-shadow: rgba(74, 55, 40, 0.22= ) 0px 18px 50px; } .gal-item:nth-child(1) { grid-area: span 2 / span 2; } .gal-item:nth-child(4) { grid-column: span 1; } .gal-item:nth-child(5) { grid-column: span 1; } .gal-item img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-positi= on: center top; transition: transform 0.5s; } .gal-item:hover img { transform: scale(1.09); } .gal-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0px; background: linear-gradient(= to top, rgba(74, 55, 40, 0.4), transparent 60%); opacity: 0; transition: op= acity 0.3s; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; padding: 14px; } .gal-item:hover .gal-overlay { opacity: 1; } .gal-overlay i { color: white; font-size: 1.2rem; } #certificates { background: var(--white); padding: 100px 48px; } .certs-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0px auto; } .certs-wrap { position: relative; overflow: hidden; margin-top: 10px; } .certs-track { display: flex; gap: 22px; transition: transform 0.55s cubic-= bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .cert-card { min-width: calc(25% - 17px); background: var(--beige); border-= radius: 20px; overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0; box-shadow: rgba(74, 55, 40= , 0.07) 0px 6px 24px; border: 2px solid rgba(196, 168, 130, 0.18); transiti= on: transform 0.3s, box-shadow 0.3s; cursor: pointer; } .cert-card:hover { transform: translateY(-7px) scale(1.02); box-shadow: rgb= a(74, 55, 40, 0.15) 0px 18px 50px; } .cert-img { width: 100%; height: 190px; overflow: hidden; background: var(-= -white); } .cert-img img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; object-posi= tion: center center; padding: 8px; } .cert-info { padding: 16px 18px; border-top: 2px solid rgba(196, 168, 130, = 0.18); } .cert-title { font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-size: 0.87rem; c= olor: var(--text-dark); margin-bottom: 4px; line-height: 1.3; } .cert-org { font-size: 0.73rem; color: var(--text-light); margin-bottom: 3p= x; } .cert-year { font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--accent); font-weight: 700; let= ter-spacing: 1px; } .slider-btns { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; margin-to= p: 30px; } .sl-btn { width: 46px; height: 46px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid = var(--accent); background: transparent; color: var(--accent-dark); font-siz= e: 0.9rem; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.3s; display: flex; align-items: c= enter; justify-content: center; } .sl-btn:hover { background: var(--accent); color: var(--white); transform: = scale(1.12); } .sl-dots { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; justify-content: c= enter; margin-top: 16px; } .sl-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(196= , 168, 130, 0.3); cursor: pointer; transition: 0.3s; } .sl-dot.active { background: var(--accent); width: 24px; border-radius: 4px= ; } #calendar { background: linear-gradient(135deg,var(--lavender),var(--blue) = 50%,var(--mint)); padding: 100px 48px; } .calendar-inner { max-width: 900px; margin: 0px auto; } .cal-wrap { background: var(--white); border-radius: 28px; padding: 44px; b= ox-shadow: rgba(74, 55, 40, 0.12) 0px 20px 60px; } .cal-nav { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: cent= er; margin-bottom: 28px; } .cal-nav-btn { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1.5px= solid var(--accent); background: transparent; color: var(--accent-dark); c= ursor: pointer; transition: 0.3s; font-size: 0.82rem; display: flex; align-= items: center; justify-content: center; } .cal-nav-btn:hover { background: var(--accent); color: var(--white); } .cal-month { font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-size: 1.35rem; co= lor: var(--text-dark); } .cal-wd { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr); margin-bott= om: 10px; } .cal-wd div { text-align: center; font-size: 0.72rem; letter-spacing: 1px; = text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-light); font-weight: 700; padd= ing: 8px 0px; } .cal-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr); gap: 5px;= } .cday { aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-co= ntent: center; border-radius: 50%; font-size: 0.86rem; color: var(--text-mi= d); cursor: default; transition: 0.2s; } .cday.free { background: rgba(213, 245, 227, 0.6); color: var(--text-dark);= cursor: pointer; font-weight: 700; border: 1.5px solid rgba(100, 190, 140,= 0.3); } .cday.free:hover { background: var(--mint); transform: scale(1.18); box-sha= dow: rgba(100, 190, 140, 0.3) 0px 4px 16px; } .cday.busy { background: rgba(200, 200, 200, 0.12); color: rgb(204, 204, 20= 4); } .cday.today { border: 2px solid var(--accent); } .cday.selected { transform: scale(1.18); box-shadow: rgba(196, 160, 160, 0.= 4) 0px 4px 16px; background: var(--accent) !important; color: var(--white) = !important; } .time-slots { margin-top: 28px; display: none; } .time-slots.show { display: block; } .ts-title { font-size: 0.82rem; color: var(--text-mid); letter-spacing: 1px= ; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 14px; font-weight: 700; } .slots { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 26px; } .slot { padding: 8px 20px; border-radius: 30px; border: 1.5px solid var(--m= int); background: rgba(213, 245, 227, 0.3); color: var(--text-mid); font-si= ze: 0.84rem; cursor: pointer; transition: 0.25s; font-family: Lato, sans-se= rif; } .slot:hover, .slot.sel { background: var(--mint); border-color: rgba(100, 1= 90, 140, 0.5); color: var(--text-dark); font-weight: 700; } .slot.booked { background: rgba(220, 80, 80, 0.1); border-color: rgba(200, = 60, 60, 0.35); color: rgb(192, 57, 43); font-weight: 700; cursor: not-allow= ed; text-decoration: line-through; opacity: 0.8; pointer-events: none; } .slot.booked::after { content: " =E2=9C=95"; font-size: 0.75em; } .slot.booked { background: rgba(220, 80, 80, 0.1); border-color: rgba(220, = 80, 80, 0.35); color: rgb(192, 57, 43); font-weight: 700; cursor: not-allow= ed; text-decoration: line-through; pointer-events: none; } .slot.booked::after { content: " =E2=9C=97"; font-size: 0.7rem; } .bform { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px; margin-top: 14px= ; padding-top: 22px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(196, 168, 130, 0.2); } .bform.show { display: flex; } .frow { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 15px; } .ffield { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ffield label { font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--text-light); letter-spacin= g: 0.5px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; } .ffield input, .ffield textarea { padding: 12px 16px; border: 1.5px solid r= gba(196, 168, 130, 0.25); border-radius: 12px; background: var(--beige); co= lor: var(--text-dark); font-family: Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 0.88rem; t= ransition: border-color 0.3s; outline: none; } .ffield input:focus, .ffield textarea:focus { border-color: var(--accent); = background: var(--white); } .ffield textarea { resize: vertical; min-height: 88px; } .ffield.full { grid-column: span 2; } .success-box { display: none; text-align: center; padding: 40px; } .success-box.show { display: block; } .success-box .si { font-size: 3rem; margin-bottom: 14px; animation: 0.5s ea= se 0s 1 normal none running popIn; } @keyframes popIn {=20 0% { transform: scale(0); } 100% { transform: scale(1); } } .success-box h3 { font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-size: 1.5rem= ; color: var(--text-dark); margin-bottom: 8px; } .success-box p { color: var(--text-light); font-size: 0.92rem; } #contacts { background: var(--text-dark); padding: 80px 48px 40px; color: v= ar(--white); } .contacts-inner { max-width: 1200px; margin: 0px auto; } .contacts-top { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr; gap: 80px;= margin-bottom: 56px; } .contacts-brand .section-label { color: var(--powder); } .contacts-brand .section-title { color: var(--white); font-size: 2rem; marg= in-bottom: 18px; } .contacts-brand p { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); font-size: 0.93rem; li= ne-height: 1.85; margin-bottom: 28px; } .clist { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; margin-bottom: 2= 8px; } .citem { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; font-size: 0.93rem;= color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); } .citem-icon { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 12px; background: r= gba(255, 255, 255, 0.09); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-conte= nt: center; font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--powder); flex-shrink: 0; } .citem a { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); text-decoration: none; transiti= on: color 0.3s; } .citem a:hover { color: var(--white); } .social-links { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; margin-to= p: 6px; } .social-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; text-d= ecoration: none; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75); font-size: 0.88rem; tran= sition: 0.3s; padding: 11px 22px; border-radius: 30px; border: 1px solid rg= ba(255, 255, 255, 0.14); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); width: fit-= content; } .social-link:hover { color: var(--white); } .social-link.insta:hover { border-color: rgb(225, 48, 108); background: rgb= a(225, 48, 108, 0.15); } .social-link.tg:hover { border-color: rgb(0, 136, 204); background: rgba(0,= 136, 204, 0.15); } .social-link .s-icon { font-size: 1.35rem; transition: transform 0.3s; line= -height: 1; } .social-link:hover .s-icon { transform: scale(1.22) rotate(-8deg); } .social-link.insta .s-icon { color: rgb(225, 48, 108); } .social-link.tg .s-icon { color: rgb(0, 136, 204); } .cform-title { font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-size: 1.25rem; = color: var(--white); margin-bottom: 20px; } .cform { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; } .cform input, .cform textarea { padding: 12px 16px; border: 1.5px solid rgb= a(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 12px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255,= 0.07); color: var(--white); font-family: Lato, sans-serif; font-size: 0.88= rem; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.3s; } .cform input::placeholder, .cform textarea::placeholder { color: rgba(255, = 255, 255, 0.32); } .cform input:focus, .cform textarea:focus { border-color: var(--powder); } .cform textarea { min-height: 90px; resize: vertical; } .csuccess { display: none; text-align: center; padding: 28px; color: var(--= mint); } .csuccess.show { display: block; } .csuccess i { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 8px; } .footer-bottom { border-top: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.07); padding-t= op: 28px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-betwee= n; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 14px; } .footer-copy { font-size: 0.78rem; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.32); } .footer-cross { font-size: 1.1rem; color: rgba(196, 168, 130, 0.38); } .lightbox { display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0px; background: rgba(0,= 0, 0, 0.93); z-index: 9999; align-items: center; justify-content: center; = cursor: pointer; } .lightbox.open { display: flex; } .lightbox img { max-width: 88vw; max-height: 88vh; object-fit: contain; bor= der-radius: 12px; cursor: default; animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal none ru= nning lbIn; } @keyframes lbIn {=20 0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.9); } 100% { opacity: 1; transform: none; } } .lb-close { position: absolute; top: 22px; right: 30px; color: white; font-= size: 2rem; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.3s; line-height: 1; } .lb-close:hover { transform: scale(1.2) rotate(90deg); } @media (max-width: 960px) { nav { padding: 16px 20px; } nav.scrolled { padding: 12px 20px; } .nav-links { display: none; flex-direction: column; gap: 0px; position: a= bsolute; top: 100%; left: 0px; right: 0px; background: rgba(255, 255, 240, = 0.97); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-top: 1px solid rgba(196, 168, 13= 0, 0.18); } .nav-links.open { display: flex; } .nav-links li { border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(196, 168, 130, 0.1); } .nav-links a { display: block; padding: 14px 24px; } .burger { display: flex; } .nav-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; flex-shrink: = 0; } .nav-insta { font-size: 1.5rem; align-items: center; color: var(--text-mi= d); display: flex !important; } .nav-tg { font-size: 1.5rem; align-items: center; color: var(--text-mid);= display: flex !important; } .nav-logo { font-size: 1.05rem; } .hero-content { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; padding: 40px 24px= ; text-align: center; } .hero-photo { width: 270px; height: 340px; } .hero-badge-float { right: 0px; bottom: 10px; } .hero-tags { justify-content: center; } .hero-cross { display: none; } .about-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; } .about-photos { height: 280px; } .about-photo-main { width: 190px; height: 250px; } .about-photo-sec { width: 160px; height: 210px; } .about-values { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .services-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; grid-auto-rows: 200px; } .gal-item:nth-child(1) { grid-area: span 2 / span 2; } .cert-card { min-width: calc(50% - 11px); } .contacts-top { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 40px; } section { padding: 64px 24px; } #gallery, #certificates, #contacts { padding: 64px 24px; } } @media (max-width: 500px) { .frow { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .ffield.full { grid-column: span 1; } .hero-photo { width: 230px; height: 290px; } .gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; grid-auto-rows: 240px; } .gal-item:nth-child(1) { grid-area: span 1 / span 1; } .cert-card { min-width: 100%; } } @keyframes spin {=20 100% { transform: rotate(360deg); } } svg[style*=3D"inline-block"] { width: 1em; height: 1em; line-height: 1; } .nav-insta svg, .nav-tg svg { width: 1.45rem; height: 1.45rem; } .btn-primary svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; } .btn-svc svg { width: 0.85rem; height: 0.85rem; } .sl-btn svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; } .cal-nav-btn svg { width: 0.85rem; height: 0.85rem; } .gal-overlay svg { width: 1.2rem; height: 1.2rem; color: white; } .svc-meta svg { width: 0.75rem; height: 0.75rem; } .citem-icon svg { width: 1rem; height: 1rem; } .csuccess svg { width: 2rem; height: 2rem; } .social-link .s-icon svg { width: 1.35rem; height: 1.35rem; } ------MultipartBoundary--x2lc8nRWEaXbqx49OvX1rMHRe6j76XS7rD4nIdpAqm------
